performance_overview: Through 20 sessions (inception 2026-06-01 through 2026-06-24) Bull has completed 7 trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). Cumulative: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY -3.5239%, alpha +3.46 pts. Today (2026-06-24) was the 14th consecutive no-entry session; PANW reversed hard from premarket highs (RSI 43 at open), MGM printed a gap-up trap (RSI 76.5), LLY remained weak all day. Cash preservation continues to outperform significantly as SPY drifts lower — down -3.52% since inception while Bull is nearly flat.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the only consistently profitable bucket; enforce hard ceiling at RSI 60; n=2 (directionally clean, sample small)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — all overbought chase entries have lost; hard ceiling, no exceptions
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap pattern; skip entirely; MGM's RSI 76.5 gap-up today is the 5th instance of this failure mode
overnight_hold_insights: Zero overnight carries across all 20 sessions. The six-criteria gate (profitable + trailing-stop-active + above EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion) has never been met simultaneously. Extended/thin candidate pool prevents qualified entries, let alone overnight candidates. Policy is sound — no change warranted.
recent_market_context: SPY closed 731.81 on 2026-06-24, down -0.24% on the day and -3.52% since inception (2026-06-01). SPY DOWN regime persists (EMA-9 742.49 < EMA-21 742.64 as of premarket; likely widened further by EOD). Both MGM and PANW continue to fail intraday — MGM pattern: gap-up trap to RSI 76.5 at open then cooled to 53.3 by midday; PANW pattern: premarket strength then reversal to RSI 43 at open. Market offering either overextended RSI entries (gap-ups >60) or sub-threshold volume setups (rel_vol <1.3). 14th consecutive no-entry session. The universe remains beaten — 267/516 tickers below EMA alignment as of 2026-06-23 EOD.

1. MGM (score=19.1) — BEST SETUP: VCP 0.598 (well-compressed), vol_dry 0.469 (exceptional dryup), RS 1.149 (solid). Close $47.08 edged above prev_day_high $46.97 — minor breakout signal. 4. AMD (score=5.4) — WEAKEST: All metrics at boundary conditions. High-beta chip stock — amplifies downside in DOWN regime. Lowest priority; treat as a watch-only name unless something dramatically changes.

KEY SIGNAL REMINDERS:
  - RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%) — ONLY statistically valid entry zone.
  - RSI > 60 at entry: 0/4 wins (0%) — HARD REJECT, no exceptions.
  - rel_vol >= 1.3 required for breakout confirmation.
  - Pre-market gap > 2.5% = elevated-gap-risk flag (added per prior session observation).
